turns.name: CHIEF JUSTICE ROBERTS
turns.text: Justice Alito has the opinion in case 21-1158 Percoco v. United States.

turns.name: JUSTICE ALITO
turns.text: Joseph Percoco, a former aide to New York Governor Andrew Cuomo was found guilty of engaging in a wire fraud conspiracy to deprive the public of the right to his honest services. Following circuit precedent, the jury instructions stated that even if his scheme took place while he was not holding public office, he could be found to owe the same duties as public officials if he had a special relationship with the government and dominated and controlled some aspect of government business. These instructions were erroneous and we therefore reverse the Second Circuit decision affirming his conviction and remand for further proceedings. The opinion of the Court is joined in full by the Chief Justice, Justice Sotomayor, Justice Kagan, Justice Kavanaugh and Justice Barrett and in part by Justice Jackson, Justice Gorsuch has filed the concurrence in the judgment in which Justice Thomas has joined.
